titleStmt.title: SII 18.209: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 209. (B.K. No. 90 of 1932-33.) HƒÄVƒíRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: South beam in the navara·πÖgama·πá·∏çapa in the temple of Purasiddhƒìs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 18th year of the reign of Si·πÅga·πáadƒìva, SarvadhƒÅri, Jyƒìsh·π≠ha ≈õu. 3, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1228, May 8, Monday. It records a grant of money made by the merchants (nakharas) of HƒÅvari, for offerings to god VinƒÅyakadƒìva (in the temple) of god Svaya·πÅbhu-SiddhanƒÅthadƒìva. MahƒÅma·πá·∏çalƒìs11vara Lakshmƒ´pƒÅ·∏∑adƒìva is stated to be the governor at that time.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti ≈õrƒ´matu ya(yƒÅ)davanƒÅrƒÅya·πáa·πÅ bhujaba·∏∑apratƒÅpacakravartti ≈õrƒ´si·πÅ ha·πáadƒìvavarusada 18 neya sarvvadhƒÅrisa·πÅvatsarada jƒì·π£·π≠a sudha 3 s≈çmavƒÅrada·πÅdu svasti samasa (sta)pa(pra)sasi(sti)sahita·πÅ ≈õrƒ´manumahƒÅma·πÅ·∏ça·∏∑ƒìsvara·πÅ sara·πáa(·πáƒÅ)gata
vajrapa·πÅjara·πÅ ≈õrƒ´lak·π£umipƒÅ·∏∑adƒìvana rƒÅjyadalu ≈õrƒ´madanƒÅdiyagraha ra·πÅ ha variya nakhara·πÅga·∏∑u ≈õrƒ´svaya·πÅbhusidhdhanƒÅthadƒìvara vinƒÅyakadƒìvara Upaha rakke ko·π≠·π≠a gadyƒÅ·πáa nƒÅlka·πüa 4 priddhi ti·πÅga·∏∑i·πÅge ha·πáavoRead hƒÅ.
nda·πüalu varusakke gadyƒÅ·πáa 1ma 2ma·πÅ(j√±ƒÅ) narƒÅsidƒìvaru·πÅ mahƒÅjana·πÅga·∏∑u yi dharmma ma ƒÄca·πÅdrƒÅrkkƒÅ·πÅbara·πÅ pratipƒÅ·∏∑isuvaru ma·πÅga·∏∑a maha(hƒÅ)≈õrƒ´ ≈õrƒ´
